perFrameCode: //STILL A CONSTRUCTION SITE. Do not use this code fragment.
bd_b =  log(1+bass); bd_bass_ = bd_bass_*dec_m + (1-dec_m)*bd_b; bd_bass = bd_b-bd_bass_;
bd_m =  log(1+mid) ; bd_mid_  = bd_mid_ *dec_m + (1-dec_m)*bd_m; bd_mid =  bd_m -bd_mid_;
bd_t =  log(1+treb); bd_treb_ = bd_treb_*dec_m + (1-dec_m)*bd_t; bd_treb = bd_t-bd_treb_;
m =  50000 + (bd_slot + 0*oct*bd_nspo)*bd_recsz; //benoetigt um spaeter maxind zu suchen
gmegabuf(m) += gmegabuf (n) *  gmegabuf((bd_src*bd_noct+oct)*2); //das sind die bd_qual; #andere Pos!
bd_ampl = gmegabuf(n); bd_mean += bd_ampl; if (bd_ampl > bd_pk, bd_pk=bd_ampl, 0);
if (gmegabuf(m) > bd_pk, bd_pk = gmegabuf(m); maxind = bd_slot, 0);
